name: Ohm's Law
description: Voltage equals current multiplied by resistance.

name: Power Equation
description: Electrical power consumed by a resistor.

name: Kirchhoff's Current Law (KCL)
description: The sum of currents entering a node equals the sum leaving.

name: Kirchhoff's Voltage Law (KVL)
description: The directed sum of potential differences around any closed loop is zero.

name: RMS Voltage
description: Root mean square voltage for a pure sine wave.

name: Resonant Frequency
description: Frequency at which inductive reactance equals capacitive reactance.

name: Power Factor
description: Ratio of real power to apparent power.

name: De Morgan's First Theorem
description: The NOR of two variables is equal to the AND of their inverses.

name: De Morgan's Second Theorem
description: The NAND of two variables is equal to the OR of their inverses.
